daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving curiosity meets confidence. The universe is basically handing you permission to explore something you've been putting off. Trust that restless feeling—it's not anxiety, it's your intuition redirecting you.
daily.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, today's about showing up authentically. Stop overthinking the script. Someone (or yourself) is waiting for the real, unfiltered version of you. That's where the magic actually lives.
daily.career: Your communication skills are absolutely immaculate right now. This is your moment to speak up in that meeting, pitch that idea, or finally have that conversation you've been rehearsing in the shower. People are actually listening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and change of scenery. Even a walk to a different coffee shop counts. Mental clarity follows when you shake things up physically. Your nervous system will thank you for the refresh.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. Your mind is sharper than usual, but don't forget to actually listen instead of just waiting to talk. There's magic in the pauses.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's noticing your energy. If you're in something, vulnerability hits different right now. Single? Stop overthinking and let yourself be a little messy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are genuinely good this week—the kind that make people go 'wait, actually.' Channel that into projects that matter to you. Collaboration flows better than going solo.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Lean into grounding stuff: walks, tea, touch grass literally. Your body's asking you to slow down and you should probably listen.
